reviews.response:
Dear Sheik,

Thank you for taking the time to provide us with your feedback. We are genuinely sorry to hear that your experience did not meet your expectations. We strive to provide all our guests with a comfortable and enjoyable stay, and we regret that we fell short in your case. We would appreciate it if you could provide us with more details about the issues you encountered, so we can address them directly and ensure they are resolved for future guests. We hope you will give us another opportunity to welcome you back and provide you with the exceptional service we are known for.

Warm Regards, 
Courtyard by Marriott Bali Nusa Dua Resort.

reviews.title: We were very disappointed with the Marriott in Nusa Dua.
reviews.positives: Sadly, the hotel was a disappointment. The only good thing is that they have a doctor on site in case someone gets sick.
reviews.negatives:
The rooms have no soundproofing, even with a closed door you can hear everything from the hallway, the staff sweeping the floor, pushing trolleys, delivering room service, opening and closing of doors, the guests walking, kids running etc.  Everything comes through and  it is impossible to rest. Also, the rooms are non smoking but the guests can smoke on the balconies. Because of the poor insulation even if the balcony door is closed, if someone smokes on the balcony next to yours the smoke gets into the room and you are exposed to second hand smoking. 
The beach at the beach club is very dirty, the sand and the water as well. You have to go in really deep into the sea in order to not to be surrounded by trash, mainly plastic. When I asked the staff about this, they told me something about tides and lots of rain lately, however, the beach at all the other five star hotels was clean. Even the public beach across the road was much cleaner than the beach at the Marriott.
The hotel also lacks authenticity and the Balinese vibe. It is just a giant resort with no soul.
The floors in the rooms is covered with cheap vinyl, making them feel like more like hospital rooms.

reviews.title: Pleasant Stay & Nice Resort
reviews.text: Very nice hotel and good ambiance. You can feel the welcome start from the hotel lobby until you reach your room. Nice pool and it also very near to the beach as the resort provide shuttle to the private beach.

reviews.title: Acceptable

Best regards,

reviews.title: Terrible

Poor management. 
I have received several threats call to my room and  informed the management. Also, there were kids keep ringing the bill of my room.

The hotel entrance always smells like cooking.

reviews.title: The room was not clean, had mosquito.
reviews.text:
Disappointed. 
The toilet bowl was not clean, the room had mosquitoes, and the next day, no clean towel. Yet no manager are apologize about this.
reviews.positives: The bed is queen size, twin.

reviews.title: Not the marriott standard
reviews.text:
The Marriott standard was missing. We had to wait 30 minutes in the line for check-in. Even after that we got only one room while the other interconnected room was not ready yet. Even when we got the other room, the bathroom was not equipped with the towels, toiletries etc. Had to remind them 3 times!!! MoMo cafe is the only restaurant in the hotel, and the menu is not great either. The lady who took our order didn't know the difference between 8 inch and 8 cms pizza!!!!!
A lot needs to be done to improve the service quality!
reviews.positives: The breakfast spread is good, its a walking distance from the beach and its close to Bali Collection which has dining options

reviews.title: hotel not worth for the money
reviews.text:
First time entering the hotel, the public area really makes good impression. However, after i was shown to the room, i would expect someyhing more than that. The air conditioner was horrible. The air seemed not to spread around the room evenly.

The service was okay. It took some time for housekeeping to clean up the room though.

reviews.title: Beautiful Hotel with Unfortunate Location
reviews.text: The security of the hotel was a bit too much, after parking car guests have to make a big round walk to the lobby even after the car is being searched and the person is not carrying anything. The hotel has double entrance gates makes you feel 'so secure'. The beach is far from the hotel. Valet parking is lousy. During my 4-day stay there not a single time when I needed the car the valet man was there so I had to collect the keys from the lobby and walked down myself to get the car, so what's the point of having valet service??
reviews.positives: The pool is nice and clean

reviews.title: nice hotel
reviews.text: The location of the hotel is not perfect and there is only shuttle to the beach. So, the transport is not easy... The hotel itself is nice, new and clean. We are quite disappointed that we can not get a later check-out even though we are Marriott gold members.

reviews.title: Disappointed
reviews.text:
I was hoping to have a grand time with my family. Since this is the first time i took my son to Bali, and i also brought my parents. On the very first day, just after breakfast i took my son to wet his feet for a minute in the pool, but as soon as we got in the pool, some rude staff approached us and said that the pool was closed for 2 hours, cause they’re having some  photoshoot. Whatever the purpose of the shoot, i think its stupid to forbid guest to use the facility of the hotel, specially when its located in nusa dua. Not much to do around there, so pool access is pretty crucial at times. I was really disappointed cause the staff was practically kicking me and my 3 year old son out of the pool in the manner that is far from acceptable
for me. I definitely wont be going back there. For anyone considering to stay at this hotel, specially if youre a family traveler, think again. This hotel care about income more than guest satisfaction.

reviews.title: Service & Cleanliness Not Good
reviews.text: Courtyard management must pay more attention to the cleanliness of guest rooms & employee services to guests, where they only pay attention to the external appearance of their guests. I was very offended by the service they provided to my family. The items I left at the front desk were just left there like trash. Meanwhile, other guests' belongings are not treated like that. I was warned from the start that my child has allergies, so the room & everything in it must be clean. The reality is not like that. There were even some ants under the pillow & table. Even their housekeeping left used tissue on the headboard of the bed.  I really regret choosing Courtyard.
reviews.response:
Dear Laura,

Thank you for sharing your feedback. We understand how frustrating it was, and we apologize for the unsatisfactory experience you had at our resort. 

We are addressing the issues with our housekeeping team to ensure such oversights don't happen again. Your concerns about the treatment of your belongings are taken seriously, and corrective measures will be implemented. We value your input and hope to have the opportunity to make amends on a future visit.

Thank you for bringing this to our attention. We would appreciate another time to welcoming you back here for a better stay experience.

Warm regards,
Courtyard by Marriott Bali Nusa Dua Resort

reviews.title: Poor customer service and value
reviews.text: We stayed at the Courtyard on our last night in Bali to be close to the airport and early morning flight home. First impressions are good, spacious modern and fantastic large pool area. The problem began in the evening we were shocked to hear such loud singing almost as if it was in our actual room. Turns out even though hotel half empty we were given a connecting room with a young man travelling with friends and out for a good time. The connecting door does nothing to stop the noise from the room next door, laughing, singing, talking non-stop, doorbells are extra loud here as well. Woken all night, hotel changed us rooms after midnight when he still wouldn't stop. A bad end to a lovely relaxing Bali holiday, would recommend Alya in Ubud very peaceful and Montogo in Seminyak as well, certainly no flimsy connecting doors. The only people should be put in such rooms are families and friends travelling together otherwise you really have no privacy, peace or quiet...

reviews.title: unhappy person on holiday
reviews.text: room I paid for with Agoda was not made available to me, was offered free drink returned ( I can buy my own ). in adequate drinks facilities in the room coffe and tea. later moved to another room ( the one I should have had previously ), breakfast was not good egbs poached eggs like rubber and I was one of the first persons at the table that morning. To have my room cleaned I had to wate over 5 hours and finally when using the gym for training I was informed by the attendant I should mind how I use the weights due to a child being in the room not being attended by it's mother. I then advised the attendant that I have been using the gym for the past 39 years and have never been requested to look after a child "NOT ACCEPTABLE "

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Checkin took forever. After waiting for three hours we were given non-functional rooms. AC was not working, it wasn't clean.

reviews.title: quite dissappointed
reviews.text:
i checked in with my colleagues. all room with double bed not available, they upgrade one level to twin bed. it's ok. but said one still not available, have to wait.
i wait in my colleague's room, until 1 hour still no update from them. dissappointed. The room key also error, need to walk a big turn again to the receptionist.

No hair dryer, for me it's ok. but for ladies guest, will be issue.
reviews.positives: clean, large and not so expensive

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: The swimming pool, the ambience near the momo cafe was good. Room was spacious
reviews.negatives:
We were travelling with a 2.5 yr old, that too for the first time for my son. First, we booked the room from Oct 29 and reached late on Oct 30, therefore missing a whole day. I informed the hotel 2-3 days back that this was a mistake. They still charged us a FULL DAY EXTRA STAY AS THEY SAID IT WAS DUE TO THE FACT THAT WE RESERVED THROUGH BOOKING.COM . We were also immediately given the room in the ground floor (lobby level) with the worst view. When questioned, the woman was adamant that nothing is available and only when I said that this is the least they can do, I was given a room on 2nd floor. The woman was laughing while speaking a different language with her supervisor. 
Same thing happened for dinner charges. Each dinner was charged by cash while we tried to reason that we will pay while checking out. The staff insisted that we did not make any deposit while the receptionist never once mentioned that we needed to separately make a deposit. Shelling out that much amount of IDR was an unnecessary trouble.
The saddest part is every part of our trip, people were kind and nice to us to as we were travelling with a kid, yet a hotel like this was not! Strange!
Otherwise the stay was fine. Frankly, I will not recommend courtyard, there are much better hotels near the nusa dua and other beaches. Other hotels such as Grand Hyatt, Melia is far better in location and facilities.

reviews.title: Disappointing
reviews.text: Disappointing! got 1 unprofessional driver, rooms were not clean, no bath-up on my room as well!
reviews.positives: Nice lobby, great kids club, comfortable environment

reviews.title: Dissapointing
reviews.negatives:
Room was very noisy and couldn’t sleep as we were in an adjoining room with very loud neighbours. The cost of good and beverages was expensive compared to the quality .
Lack of poolside seating as many guests reserved spots and they were. Allowed to stay unoccupied. The beach was too far to walk which was not clear on the website. Overall not a good experience

reviews.title: Great swimming pool and hospitality
reviews.text:
Really loved to stay at Courtyard Nusa Dua. Great swimming pool for relaxing and enjoying Bali vibes. Eventough going to their private beach took some distance, but they provided free shuttle hourly from Hotel to their private beach. 
Local restaurants and souvenir shops were within walking distance from Hotel.
Really kind and friendly staff, all showed great hospitality. Special thanks to Yoga from housekeeping who gave us exceptional service beyond our expectations, his attetion to small details really pleased us.
Thank you Courtyard Nusa Dua for making our holiday very memorable.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Pool View, Guest Room, 2 Double, Pool View, Balcony

reviews.title: Deceitful staff
reviews.text: I booked one night here and prepaid the room. Unfortunately, I brought the wrong credit card with me. I presented all documents showing I'm the same person including the credit card e-statement. Staff said that they need to charge my card again and would just reverse the charge on Monday as banks were closed.  It has been almost a week now and no one from the hotel has contacted me to confirm the reversal.  My stay would have been great except for this deceitful practice.

reviews.title: Too much waiting
reviews.text: We had to wait almost one hour for check in, after  we get to our nice room, we still have to wait another 1/2 hours to have our towel, napkin and others 😳.

reviews.title: I won't stay here again
reviews.text: Very noisy even in the midnight . I can't sleep well .

reviews.title: Weekend hotel trip from Jakarta
reviews.text:
1- Room not cleaned on one day til 5pm+.
2- Hotel not beachfront, rely upon shuttle bus to take you to small Marriot beach area some 8 mins drive away or 2km walk.
3- Narrow pool but long type running between hotel room wings. One side dark- one side sunny.
4- Insufficient sun beds in pool area, if you don't grab one by 6am then forget...
5- Breakfast good but hectic - better at 10am.
6- Bar in pool closed at 8pm.
7- Really poor gym.
reviews.positives: Got room free upgrade but garden view to motorbike parking, breakfast,

reviews.title: Just an ordinary western hotel thrown in Bali...
reviews.text:
Great pool and thats about it.... needs more local culture.

The room service menu sucks, why not reflect the culture of the destination more... only 7 Indonesian dishes on the whole menu ( incl kids, desserts etc.. ).

Its just another western hotel chucked in Bali.... you can have the same thing in Australia or USA. :)

reviews.title: Dissapointing hotel, we never stay here again
reviews.text: We feel dissapointed with this hotel. Our son fell down several times because of the slippery floor while it was raining. The hotel looks very old eventhough it was only built on 2011 and it seems that this hotel is not maintained well. We can see many leakage on the ceiling. The room was small and the furniture looks so old. The wall was so thin that we can hear our neighbour conversation or the kids running around above our room. The towel are so old that its colour is grey. They only give free 2 hour time for our kids to play in the kids club otherwise there is an extra charge for that.

reviews.title: Average
reviews.text:
I found the hotel very average first because of its location. Nusa Dua is a proper tourist ghetto which gives the wrong outlook of Bali. 
The hotel itself was okay, but it lacks authenticity. It looks westernised to a large scale! Moreover the corridors never ends and the conditions of common areas are not good (holes in the ceiling, water dropping from ceiling and walls etc.) Also there is no direct access to the beach and you get to take a free shuttle from the hotel. The beach is nice but there are rubbish everywhere.

reviews.title: All show and no go
reviews.text: Upon checking in our room wasn't ready, which was weird because we got there at 4pm and check in was at 2pm. The gym is not a real gym. A treadmill and that's it. Mosquitos were in our room our entire stay. Breakfast was good. Location is remote so we found ourselves leaving the hotel a lot. The massages in the hotel were expensive $80 Aus but behind the hotel we found a few places or $10 an hour. The shower water wasn't hot. Luke warm. Staff are friendly but don't speak English. I wouldn't call this place a 5 star but it was a nice enough stay.

reviews.title: Nice room and Big pool
reviews.text:
Nice area and location. 
Staff was not very helpful with security situation due to the big conference going on. It was har to get in and out and they did not want to issue a photo id for the guests.
reviews.positives: Pool is great and Service is nice

reviews.title: Hopeless would be a complement
reviews.text:
New Years celebrations ruined by one of the worse Marriot establishments I have ever come across. Let me preface my review by saying that the property is well maintained and looks good. That about as far as the compliments go Im afraid. I will list all issues by the hotels offerings:

1) Marriott Beach facilities - Rating (Abysmal)
Justification :  I spent close to 45 minutes waiting on a Mojito (if the drinks were being flown in from Jakarta, I can understand but this was truly an extraordinary wait time for a basic cocktail mix). It doesn't end there I'm afraid, we did make a return run to the beach some days later to find that there were no beach towels available. We did not take the hotel shuttle back and opted to hop a taxi to a restaurant nearby (wet trunks and all) to the point I had to borrow linen from the restaurant just to dry up. Is this not a basic facilities failure? 
2)  Dapur Santai Pool Bar and Grill - Rating (Fair)
Justification : Again with the record breaking wait time for a Tequila Sunrise (clocked at 30 minutes) to which I got fed up of waiting, I called the waitress and she conveniently told me the order was not locked in. Only after a public outburst which is not something common to me whilst on break, did fear set in and service levels started improving. 
3) Momo Express - Rating (Excellent)
Justification : Astuti from Momo Express.She is a seasoned hand and was most helpful on the rainy nights when we stopped for drinks. 
4) Momo Restaurant - Rating (Fair)
Justification : There are at least two instances I can recall where we made orders for coffee at breakfast that didn't arrive .  There are no proper guidelines or boards on where exactly to wait to be seated, we commandeered a table  on the first day as no one had informed us of the process, there was plenty of wait staff around but none seemed to be attentive. I would be waving my hands around at times and no action was taken.
5) The Actual Residences - Rating (Fair)

reviews.title: small variety of food
reviews.text: I was on vacation to Bali and bringing toddler, we spent most of the day in the Hotel. In Room Dining menu variation was not as many as expected (boring food). I brought babyfood that sometimes need to be microwaved, the staff was helping us but it took a long time to microwave the food, I dont know why. Also on the last day at 10PM suddenly our bathroom got flooded from upper room's bathroom, We called engineer, and it get fixed around 11.30PM, they cleaned up my bathroom and also replace towels etc. They offer us to move to other room, we refused because it was the last day and my toddler already sleep. On check out they offer us compensation to waive some of charges our in-room dining. Overall they have to upgrade the staff performance and preventive maintenance.

reviews.title: awesome 5 star

reviews.title: Standard hotel, common facilities

reviews.title: Comfortable Hotel

reviews.title: located in good, clean touristy area
reviews.text:
Hotel don't have a beach, courtesy bus has been provided. Beach is very dirty with tonnes of plastic bottles and rubbish.
Rubbish floating in a water.Bali is disgraceful. Rubbish is every where in a local street. Nusa dua is clean,but outside just awfully. My good advice,before you invite people,clean up your backyard. Hygiene is not issue there, rats in the street, hundreds.Piles of rubbish. Water polluted. For good sake, don't go there don't waste your money

reviews.title: A very pleasant stay , very relax.
reviews.text:
Staff at  hotel are very friendly and helpful. Very quick service. Lovely garden and
swimming pool. Very polite staff. Room is very comfortable.

reviews.title: Nice hotel with some minus
reviews.text:
this hotel is new, very clean. the lagoon pool is nice but not suitable for kids. 
room is nice but we can hear people talking from other room and from different level balcony. 
only 1 shuttle car goes to the beach. we need to wait for more than 15 minutes for the car picking up us.
i will recommend other hotels in nusa dua.

reviews.title: big hotel in nusa dua area
reviews.text: we booked the deluxe room during our stay but the room size smaller then we expected

reviews.title: New Hotel but has many mosquitoes
reviews.text:
Stayed for 4 days 3 Nights. Upon checking in, was given the option to upgrade to a Pool view at additional 10USD per night. Friendly staff, nice new hotel but apparently the room has many mosquitoes. I was killing more than 5 mozzie per night and had many bites.

Breakfast selection weren't fantastic, kitchen staff service were fair only. I would may not consider on staying at Courtyard by Marriott Bali again.
reviews.positives: The tranquility. Hotel is situated in a prime location of Bali.

reviews.title: New hotel, modern design
reviews.text: Our room is in ground floor, easy access to swimming pool. Good for family with children. A bit noisy, May be not a good quality of wall. We can hear the cleaning service trolley, wheeling along the corridor and people chatting outside the room. Have to ask for sanitary kits. Only shower caps and towels in the bathroom. No access to the beach. No steam or sauna room.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: buffet breakfast has average, not many selections, taste of the food was average

reviews.title: Contemporary hotel but no beach front
reviews.text:
We expected to stay on a beach-front hotel so we were a little disappointed, especially coming from Tanah Lot Pan Pacific which definitely has an organic vibe.
If you like urban international contemporary style business hotels, then you will enjoy the Courtyard by Marriott very much.
The other surprise was that the breakfast was not included, which means our hotel deal wasn't that great in the end.
Otherwise, the staff was always very nice, helpful and reactive.
For instance, we were upgraded to a better room when we checked-in instead of waiting for the people to check-out in the kind of room we had booked.
The food is very fresh even though a little more expensive than the big hotels around.
All together, after having adjusted to the urban style hotel, we had a great time there.

The pool area is nice, but there's no beach access. We love our butler Septi.
reviews.response:
Dear Norton,

Thank you for sharing your feedback regarding your recent stay. We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience caused by the discrepancy in the room's appearance and the confusion about the breakfast allocation. Your health and well-being are of utmost importance to us, and we regret to hear about the discomfort experienced after the Christmas Eve Buffet.

On a positive note, we're glad to hear that you enjoyed the pool area and appreciate your kind mention of our butler, Septi. We take your comments seriously and will address the areas of concern to improve our overall guest experience.

We appreciate your understanding and hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back for an enhanced stay in the future.

Warm regards,
Courtyard by Marriott Bali Nusa Dua Resort

reviews.title: Run down.
reviews.text:
We pulled up into the Marriott courtyard to the sounds Balinese traditional music being played live and welcomed with a quaint touch of elegance by a Legong dancer. Our expectations were already set that this was going to be another brilliant place to hang for the remainder of our trip. Unfortunately this was not the case. 

Getting into our room was such an anti-climax. The room was clearly old and run down. What was supposed to be a garden view - overlooked the roof of the Marriott, covered in beer cans dropped by guests from the floors above. Queen beds were small doubles and the room smelled like mould when the aircon wasn't on. It was clear that the images supplied to Agoda had been nicely photoshopped. 

We were upgraded to two different rooms as we didn't get what it said on the tin. However - irrespective of the room, they all faced the same common issues. Old furnishing, dirty windows, pungent smell of mould etc. This place is really in need of a revamp.

The pool area is fantastic though. Unfortunately we aren’t fish can couldn’t sleep in the pool otherwise we would have. The staff were beautiful. It’s just a pity that the aesthetics of the property aren't as awesome the staff that service them.

When asked what the hotel will do, I've been given a business card by the LPM and was advised that if this happens again, I should call him directly on his mobile even if he is not on the job, cause he lives nearby. This from my opinion shouldn't be standard procedure for a five star hotel. Anyway, besides of this unpleasant experience, stay was okay.

reviews.title: Great rooms but poor service
reviews.text:
I went to Courtyard by Marriott with my husband and a 3 year old daughter. The room is very clean and the environment is nice and neat. However, the service that we experienced is not that great. As my daughter was running a fever on that night, we decided to order in (room service) our dinner. We called the room service number at around 645pm and ordered our dinner (2 adult meals + 1 kid's meal) and was told that the order would take 45 mins. We agreed and put down the phone. The dinner did not come at 730pm so at 745pm, my husband called again and repeated our orders and got the reply "On the way." 
At 8pm, our dinner is still not delivered to the room. I called and asked them if they had missed our order. To my horror, they said yes, they missed our order. We would have to wait for another 45 mins to get our dinner. I was very furious because I have a hungry and sick toddler! Then at 830pm, our dinner finally arrived. All appetite was gone by then.

reviews.title: Nice hotel in poor location
reviews.text:
The hotel itself is nice: clean, modern, safe. The pool is large, but doesn't get enough direct sunlight. Breakfast buffet was great. However, the location is poor. If you are going to Bali for a beach experience, do NOT stay here. First, the hotel is not on the beach, you must take the hotel's van to get there. Second, the beach is DIRTY. It was by far the dirtiest beach and water I have ever seen in my life (and I live in Hong Kong, so believe me -- I've seen dirty beaches). The hotel's beach is at the end of the Nusa Dua stretch, so all of the trash collects on the sand and in the water. The farther you walk down the beach, the cleaner it gets, but it's still quite dirty. We did see some staffers attempting to dig up the trash, but it was simply too much for them to handle. I do not know if this is a seasonal problem, we were there at the end of July. 

I suggest doing your research and figuring out what kind of experience you want in Bali before you book this hotel.

reviews.title: Value of Money except Not Very Honest!
reviews.text:
I ordered a Superior Room, they gave me a Standard Room. When I first time asked what room they gave me, they answered a Standard. I was very unhappy and had the feeling of being deceived. It's either the front desk staffs not honest, or they are too careless!
But eventually I managed to change back to a Superior Room, matching what I have paid.
Other than that, other hotel staffs are friendly with smiling faces, & helpful.

Free WiFi but not too speedy.

Free transport to Kuta Town (every hour) is an advantage.

Breakfast is good enough.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: We had booked for 7+1 (kid), which included the breakfast for all as per the booking. But as per the Hotel, since its 3 rooms, only 6 breakfast would be given. Upon escalating, they did allow bf for all, but as a good gesture. This is not a good gesture, but something we were entitled for. Unfortunate to have a 30 minutes discussion and arguing with the manager.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Pool View, Guest Room, 2 Double, Pool View, Balcony

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: The pools are beautiful and the grounds are lovely. The room is need of updates. Very worn.  Disappointing. That being said the staff are all friendly and attentive.
reviews.response:
Dear Ann,

Thank you for choosing to stay with us and for sharing your feedback. We greatly appreciate your kind words about our beautiful pools, lovely grounds, and the friendly, attentive service provided by our staff. We are sorry to hear that the condition of your room did not meet your expectations. We value your feedback and hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back for an enhanced experience.

Warm regards,
Courtyard by Marriott Bali Nusa Dua Resort
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Pool View, Guest room, 1 King, Pool view, Balcony

reviews.title: Abit dull
reviews.text: Room was overpriced after hidden fees, pictures of the pool access room were abit deceiving, late check-in was disappointing but breakfast and the pool was nice
reviews.response:
Dear Bryce,

Thank you for your feedback. We apologize for any inconvenience during your stay. We apologize for the hidden surcharges and your confusion with the room pictures. We will review our procedures and make improvements. We also apologize for the inconvenience at check-in and will work to streamline our processes. On a positive note, we are very pleased to hear that you enjoyed our breakfast and our swimming pool. Your satisfaction is important to us and we are thrilled to know that aspects of your stay met your expectations. Thank you again for your feedback. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back in the future and provide you with an even better experience. 

Warm Regards,
Courtyard by Marriott Bali Nusa Dua Resort

reviews.title: First time visit make me want to go back, second time not anymore :(
reviews.text: Staff dont have information to help guess, room have small ant....breakfast buffet so limited for hotel with this price.... overall there are so many hotel in  Bali now better try another place

reviews.title: New hotel with good facility
reviews.text: Stayed with young children in November. The hotel provided baby cot and they also have ice bucket in the room which is very nice to beat the sunny bali. The hotel has a kids club and nice pool. the only minus is there is no beach adjacent to the hotel but they have a beach club that can be accessed with hotel's shuffle car.

reviews.title: Pleasant stay
reviews.text:
Travellers who seek for tranquility in a natural modern setting would find it here. The large pool with the trees combined in the center of the hotel made me feel home. The kids club was really 'wow' us, the staff was friendly and there were lots of activities provided from drawing to group activities. Our 7-years-old loved it.

The beach club was also a-must-see place, it has good spot and well-maintained facilities. The driver of the shuttle was the friendliest staff in the hotel, he actively helped returning one of our bags left in the shuttle..

We were there when it was raining and some coridors were leaking which made it slippery. I think the rainy season could be anticipated better. The food was just so-so for a 5-star hotel...but overall...it was a pleasant stay...
reviews.positives: Kids club, large pool, nice room

reviews.title: It was ok but i quiet noisy at night
reviews.text: It was ok but i heard lots of noises coming from other room, cant sleep because of this. Breakfast was not that good but price is slightly lower for 5 star in this area

reviews.title: Refreshing
reviews.text: Feels good but the location of the private beach was too far!
reviews.positives: Nice staff, amazing pool view, luv the kids club

reviews.title: Review
reviews.text: I enjoyed my stay for 3 days 2 nights in Courtyard, and I love the concept of the private beach with frequent shuttle service. The only things which I felt slightly dissapointed was the internet connection, it wasn't stable most of the time and I've been told that during my return stay, wifi usage is as charge (i.e free wifi only for first time user), however I am unsure whether ths statement is true as I found that as a frequent traveller, I travelled most of the places and so far I've never encountered that I need to pay for wifi service in the hotel stays, and I believe Courtyard as a 5 star hotel would definitely provide a much better wifi service without charges for especially most business people may stay in the premise.
reviews.positives: breakfast, staff service, private beach and shuttle services

reviews.title: I expected more
reviews.text:
Let's start this of by saying that I'll be slightly harsh. But. After all, this IS a 5 star resort and should be treated as such.

And as a 5-star resort, it falls short.
Ridiculous security measures make you feel more like a suspect going in than a warm welcome guest. (First time ever I have to "spread out and be searched" each time upon entering a hotel)
Some people may find it comforting, I found it unnervinf
Rooms are a bit impersonal and small, but clean and nice bed/bathroom.

Lacking proper amenities though: I was expecting better soap (branded, perhaps like in many other 5-star hotels in Indonesia). 
They failed to supply q-tips, after making up my room (2nd day), I lacked all small towels & bath mat, hand hold showerhead in bath doesn't work (room 5202), bath faucet kept dripping, only 1 type of tea/coffee supplied etc.
I was really expecting more for the price and Marriott name.

reviews.title: So so option
reviews.text: The hotel is good for value but the room was not clean enough when we arrived. The floor and room was still wet and humid. There are many mosquitos in the room and we got some bites during the night. We could not find the refreshing feeling like the case of other stays at other Marriott's.

In the area, I guess it is a good quality for the price.
I would not come back as I don't like Nusa Dua (not the real Bali in my opinion)

reviews.title: Amazing pool
reviews.text: Good. Did not get a pool view room and the view sucked, but the room itself was comfortable. The hotel does not have direct beach access. reviews.title: Comfortable stay in Marriott Courtyard
reviews.text: It was comfortable. Me and my hubby love the pool especially! Love the pool view even while we have breakfast. High security. It is near Bali Collection and we could go for shopping. Friendly staff who greeted us warmly when we arrived.

reviews.title: a nice room
reviews.text: It was a nice experience stay in this hotel. The room size is quite large with 2 extra single bed. They have a private beach, however it is not in the same area with the hotel, you need to take the shuttle bus to go to the beach.

reviews.title: Nice clean rooms though not centrally located
Excellent stay
reviews.text: The room was comfortable and clean. The location was superb and surrounded by beautiful trees/garden in Nusa Dua.

reviews.title: Nice clean new hotel
reviews.text:
Nice enough but lacked the final polish. Nothing to complain about except it was very busy & at full capacity with a lot of local people on holiday raiding the breakfast bars & generally making lots of noise & mess but that's just being overly picky.

Service was acceptable without being brilliant whereas I expected a little extra effort as you're paying more for a western style recognised brand.

It's away from the beach but have a private area next to the hyatts beach strip allocated & there's regular shuttles. 

All in all not a bad place but if you have your heart set on Nusa Dua & the western style packaged holiday go for the Westin, St Regis or Hyatt but expect to pay a bit more.

reviews.title: Nice Hotel and facilities
reviews.text: When we checked in...all rooms were full,so we have to settle with one kingsize bed instead of twins...kids still had a great time though...they still enjoyed the swimming pool and kids club...as long as kids enjoyed their stayed, we're happy...

reviews.title: Standard hotel with poor service
reviews.text:
We have spent 5 days with family and friends there for our wedding, but the service was very disappionting. Will not go back there again. 
1. no superise gift or greeting card for the couple that they knew we are here to get marry. 
2. did not provide any toothbrush,shower cap etc without any notice, need to ask FO to bring it everyday.
3. bill has been caculated wrong, for the wedding lunch. we mentioned many times, we dont want to have spice food for guest, but the food was still a bit spice. 
4. local telephone charges was extremely expensive...
5. no other restaurant for dinner, only the breakfast cafe. 

but the conference staff was helpful, with nice smile. breakfast was ok.

reviews.title: excellent hotel with good services
reviews.text: This is a great hotel recommended for honeymooners. Location wise, it is far from Kuta and other sightseeing places. For those who want to get away from the business of the town and just come to Bali to relax and chill. I would recommend this place.

- Very large swimming pool

- Green hotel, there are trees & garden everywhere

Cons:
- So many mosquitos, especially in the garden

reviews.title: Value for money
reviews.text: Overall good place to stay. Ideal for families. Swimming pool was very convenient and in the shade of several trees.  Key issues were remote beach and lack of options on the in room dining menu. If someone were to stay 5 days, they probably run out of options on the menu and have to go outside with young kids every night.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The beach was pleasant and peaceful, offering a relaxing atmosphere. A convenient shuttle service operates hourly to and from the beach. The breakfast was of good quality, with a wide variety of options available. Overall, it is a good destination, whether traveling alone or with family.
reviews.negatives: I was shocked to find that I was put in a connecting room despite that I was traveling alone, as this does not align with the standards I expect from a five-star hotel. Although the room was changed the following day after I raised a complain this remains a significant concern. I strongly request the hotel to review its room allocation procedures to ensure that similar situation does not happen to  future guests.

Everything perfect.
Only I didn't realize at the booking that the hotel is quite far away from the beach. And the beach faces really extreme high and low tide, thus it was impossible to swim.
reviews.positives: The amazing "river pool" - never seen such an awesome pool before. And the staff was extremely friendly and helpful and made my mum's birthday to a real dream.

reviews.title: Great swimming pool area. Nothing really for kids to play. Far away from the beach. Not good food.
reviews.negatives: The room wardrobe had a cricket inside and every night it was making noise. Could not stop. I believe it was something inside the wood. The Dinner buffet was not really good - you can each much better for half price on all restaurants outside the hotel. There was literally nothing for kids as the kids room area had nothing they could really play rather than some super simple toys for small babies-the mini golf was in awful condition. The beach is not as close as mentioned by the website and shuttle easily get full and you risk to stay there for 40 minutes to wait the next-they should put some more shuttle or something to help people moving.

We stayed at this hotel for 3 nights. The location of the hotel is about 3 to 5 mins away from the beach and you would have to take a shuttle to go there.  The hotel provides for the shuttle every 30 mins.

The food was so-so...not what we were expecting for a 5star hotel. we paid $25 for the buffet breakfast and they serve the same food everyday. we transferred to sofitel and they have the same buffet price and their food was way better.

reviews.title: Very good

I got a replacement room at the last night and was shocked that the bath towels in the room were filthy and bath robes dirty.
Overall, the staffs are very courteous which made my stay slightly more bearable.

reviews.negatives: Minimal food options for vegetarians. Getting to the beach was a bit of a hassle, might be nicer to book something with a beachfront attached to it

reviews.title: OK Location and casual staff
reviews.text:
I find staff love to talk may be part of their training, however they are not really concern about guest convinience. I had not good experience in their only Resturant and at the time of departure. I deposited cash $100/ at the time of check in, which they forget to return at time of check out. I only realized on the way to airport, then i had to come back for the same.
I find staff is busy among their own colleages. Their action have to more sincere to customer.

Iam a Marriot reward member but they refused to honor the same as i made my booking thru Agoda. This is not right.
reviews.positives: Rooms are well appointed, very good neat and clean,

reviews.title: Nice hotel but service lacking
reviews.positives: Location good, good big pool, nice kids play area and good breakfast
reviews.negatives:
Maybe not value for money. Check in was long and the staff could do more given the price. When directing us to the room we were just told it’s in building 5, no offer to help lead us there. 
We also had lunch round the pool on the first day, we went back to the same spot at the pool the next morning and the leftover dirty plate was still sitting there, no one had taken it. These small details where the service and standards were lacking given the price.

reviews.title: Stayed and played
reviews.text: Great stay just a little thin on the walls you could hear a pin drop next door. So you know how loud it was with a 2 year old crying at 5am

reviews.title: Great pool but disappointed with power outage and unattentive staff
reviews.positives: The pool is amazing, perfect for swimming with my daughter.
reviews.negatives: There were power outage twice and the last one happened at night for over 1 hour. it’s not something we expected to have from a 5 stars hotel in Nusa Dua. The interior is not bad but felt impersonal and basic.

reviews.title: Reasonable price 5 stars hotel in bali
reviews.text: We love this Hotel.  Staff all are over friendly. Room is clean. Relaxing pool and with live band daily. We are doing nothing but just sitting in poolside everyday and relax.

reviews.title: Comfortable stay
reviews.negatives: We almost missed our flight because of the transfer, miscommunication with the staff

reviews.title: A bit like a maximum security prison!
reviews.text: The hotel is nice. State of the art hotel but unfortunately it is located in Nusa Dua. Nusa Dua is isolatet from the rest of Bali. Guarded by security personal and surrounded by a fence. The charm of Bali is cept away from Nusa Dua. When ever you enter the hotel you have to pass a security control and even your package will be scanned. The beach is very nice and very clean. And the sea is perfect there. But not for surfing.

reviews.negatives:

The a la carte meals from the 2 restaurants are not at 5* level, quite pricey and not very good

Mosquito

reviews.title: Plunge in. Just do it!
reviews.text: The best 2 nights stay so far. Room is big and clean with effective bathroom and balcony facing the pool. But, courtyard should fix in room's acoustic because I can hear every foot steps and all the noises from the next room, pools and the alley. Breakfast is abeit disappointing regarding the option and taste. C'mon, Marriott has that image of good food, right? The best part of this facility is the LAGOON POOL! This is superb. Wide and long blue pool with trees full of life. I did spot squirrels, beautiful sounded perkutut, night owls, even a couple of rare blue needle dragonfly. Brava!
reviews.positives: Best Swimming pool, good design, cool air conditioning

reviews.title: The hotel is nice, green and pool was really good. The rooms are big and spacious. We stayed here for 4 nights and could
reviews.positives: The rooms were big and spacious. Our room has great outdoor area.
reviews.negatives: The doors and the walls of the rooms were very thin. We couldn’t sleep a day. We can hear everyone’s voice.

reviews.title: excellent, relaxing
reviews.text: Impressed and would love to come back. The room is spacious, each (twin) bed is large so that I do not need an extra bed for my younger son to stay, the pool is amazing and so relaxing, my kids and I are enjoying it very much. The overall service is awesome. A tiny note, had my son's game's cable left in the room though, and had to go through various calls in different days before getting the confirmation that the cable could be picked up, due to the same room's occupation by other guest. Understandable. Cheers.
reviews.positives: nice swimming pool, sound internet speed, attentive staff

reviews.title: Chillax hotel so quiet
reviews.text: Everything is good but breakfast not too much western food, we dont like their indonesia cusine
reviews.positives: Nice swimming pool , clean n new our room

reviews.title: nice place for stay, quite and nice breakfast
reviews.text: I am quite enjoy staying there, and having shuttle car to pick-up to private beach.
reviews.positives: Good service and polite staff, and listen to customer, and having good security

reviews.title: Great pool & spa, responsive staff, mediocre food
reviews.text: Overall I had a lovely time. Only big quibble was that -- while otherwise and the next night, my room was very quiet -- my first morning my neighbors were either being extremely loud or the room had next to no soundproofing - I could hear their entire conversation word for word. It was pretty awful for 7 am on a vacation. Otherwise, food was not amazing (and the drinks are overpriced - to be expected). But, the pool is really nice, and in a nice garden area and the massage at the spa was one of the best I've ever had. In addition to generally being very helpful and accommodating, the staff let me check in early and check out late even though I hadn't made prior arrangements for the former which I really appreciated. Only other minor point, it was a bit further from the beach than I'd expected (10-15 min walk, or there's a shuttle - the shuttle is not very well signed).
reviews.positives: Pool/garden, the massage at the spa, the staff was very responsive and helpful

reviews.title: Nice and relaxing
reviews.text:
Our room was garden view, which was quite nice and I preferred this instead of the pool view as it gave us a feeling of seclusion. 

The hall way to this room however, had a nasty cheap toiletry smell. And it can be pretty noisy when there are people walking outside, especially when they were pushing their luggage. I think the way they arranged the hall is problematic, sound can reverberate across the hall easily, perhaps if they added carpet it might dampen the noise a bit.

During our stay, we also had problems with the room key cards. They're so sensitive and refused to work after a few times usage, that we had to go to the front desk three times a day - that is until I complained about how crappy the card was that they started to work more reliably. Very curious indeed.

reviews.title: All around comfort
reviews.text: I stayed for 4 nights and don't have much to complain about. The staff is very nice and thoughtful, the room is comfort and spacious. If you are looking for nice and relax stay, courtyard offers it all.

reviews.title: Very good experience but lack location
reviews.text: Stay was very good but the lacation was poor as it was written on site that it has a private beach, yes it do have but not adjecent yo it, they take people by shuttle but in many other five stars on tanjung benoe it is adjest to sea, so you can just walk there.

reviews.title: Comfortable luxury hotel
reviews.text: The hotel was new. Large rooms and bathroom with comfortable beds. Breakfast was great as well. Good service from the staff too. However the beach is not near the hotel but free shuttle services are provided (5mins drive). No restaurants or nightlife around the hotel as well but free shuttle services provided hourly to a mall nearby(5mins drive)
reviews.positives: Large rooms and bathroom with comfortable beds

reviews.title: nice
reviews.text: nice place for taking children,but quite far from beach

reviews.title: satisfying
reviews.positives: stay 2 days is not enough. the surrounding is really beatiful. with comfort and large hotel room.

reviews.title: Could be better
reviews.text:
Spent 5 nites at the hotel. Wished it had been better.
1.Walls were very thin. We could hear people talking and children running.
2.Towels were old and grey.
3.Food at the restaurant was average.
4.Wifi was very unstable.
I would definitely spend my time in Nusa Dua in another hotel.
reviews.positives: Clean rooms, friendly staff and tight security

reviews.title: A central located 5 star hotel
reviews.text: My purpose is for business meeting. Although I extend two days stay after my business, most of the day are out to city for shopping and slightseeing. For hotel, basically the breakfast are quiet good as a five star hotel. Room are clean and bed are confortable.

reviews.title: comfortable and safe in Nusa Dua
reviews.text: The Nusa Dua area has "stricty security" so it's rather safe in this area. A few comments on the room- the bathroom door(glass) is a challenge to open- just like the newly opened Baskin and Robbins door in Bali Collection---construction works alert! The ceiling in the bathroom also needs improvement as its not a pleasant sight for guests. The hotel food was good but there was one time I ordered Waffles during the breakfast buffet and the staff went inside the kitchen and got me a cold waffle. COLD . They should have made it on the spot. Oh well... There were a few conferences that were going on during our stay that screams some music and entertainment but we were okay with it. We'd probably go back to this hotel but hopes they do something about the necessary improvements on facilities and service.

reviews.title: A very relaxing and care-free holiday.
reviews.text:
Overall, a very pleasant stay.
The overall layout of the hotel, coupled with the peaceful surrounding, allows one to simply relax and enjoy the serenity. 
Apart from the breakfast, wasn't too impressed with the food ( in the menu ). The few restaurants near-by the hotel serve good Balinese food.
reviews.positives: The room was very cosy albeit a bit cramped when an extra bed was put in. The breakfast was good. The staff were friendly and helpful.

reviews.title: exclusive and a good place for conferences
reviews.text: The international conferences was successful and I have had so many colleagues after that events. The place was so Indonesia
reviews.positives: nice place for relaxing stay away from hypersonic of big city

we wanna stay somewhere near nusa dua where beaches is accessible. We really enjoyed the pool and the breakfast. The hotel setting is modern and peaceful with great attentive staffs. They also offered shuttle cars to nusa dua beach. Overall, pleasant stay.

reviews.title: Safe and secure

reviews.title: Very nice but modern--not very unique to Bali
Lovely stay
reviews.text:
When we checked in the was a mistake about the room given, eventually there are still guest luggage. We were asked to wait for them to sort it out. It was annoying waiting though we got our room upgraded to premier deluxe and get 2 coupon for 15 mnts reflexology. The room is spacious and we love the interior. Speaking about the interior, the main lobby and lagoon were beautiful. The private beach is a bit far by walk, but they offer a shuttle service so its okay. 
One problem though the sink didnt work the water didnt come out, we called the front office and the plumber came in a minute, they fixed it quickly and its working properly.
reviews.positives: The hotel design, the lagoon, and breakfast

reviews.title: Excellent

Enjoy swimming pool and sunshine. Then half day pass. 
In the afternoon. You can go to city area for shopping or take a mini trip to temple or go to coast for sea food. 
I don't have time to go to courtyard's private beach yet. It is pity. 
The only two things I will complain is: tower is so old/used, maskyto is too much.

just like all new hotels, this hotel looked good, smelled good and the staff were happy to serve. this location is good for business unless you have anything to around nusa dua. but not a great location for activity. difficult to get in and get out of this place. it is far from everywhere. 

consider to stay at this place if you are there for work or conferences or to play golf. there is a gold course just next to the hotel. if you are here for nightlife this is not the best place to stay.

reviews.title: Beautiful New Hotel

Drinks over priced, food etc but I guess they are at Nusa Dua prices. Nice rooms though an worth a stay if it's sort term 2-3 nights.

This hotel is quite new, so everything is still v good, but it seems not much tourists stay there.. and the pool was quite nice, but at nite, the lights were not so bright, i think because of the low occupancy, they tried to cut down the cost by not switching on all the lights. other than that it's a nice hotel.

It would be better if the services could be improved.

reviews.text: Although it was a short 1 night stay, we enjoyed the spacious comfort and would be glad to return to this hotel! A slight inconvenienced would be the lack of side entrances. As the only way out is through the front gate.

reviews.title: new clean hotel
reviews.text:
We were researching for our upcoming stay in Bali and found this hotel had only just opened and still in its soft opening phase. That immediately prompted us to check out this hotel on its own website.

Upon arrival at the hotel, we found it to be very clean and inviting. The architectural design and decor of the hotel immediately gave us a feeling that it will be a memorable stay. The staff was very warm and friendly. She took the time to get to know us more. In fact, every staff member we encountered during our stay were very approachable and friendly, always ready to help. 

We had their buffet breakfast at MoMo Cafe. The food was good but we thought it was a little pricy for the spread they offered. One of the best part of the stay was the pool. Nice place to chill out and dip in the water in the great Bali weather.

We also went to the Spa in the hotel for a Couple Balinese Massage. The Spa had just opened for 2 weeks so everything was very new and clean. Once again, the staff were very friendly and easy to chat with.

reviews.title: New and elegant hotel with tight security measures
reviews.text:
We stayed here for two nights & were given a large corner room with a King-sized bed & there's even room for an extra single-sized bed, which we requested for. Our balcony looks out to the pool, and great for enjoying the breeze.

The room has everything you need, from the writer's desk, arm-chair,safe deposit box, ironing board, 2 or 3 pinhole power outlets, i-phone docking amplifier cum charging station, minibar, slim plasma tv, toiletries, the bathroom comes fitted with a spacious bathtub as well as a standing rain shower.
Everything is practically brand new as the hotel was officially opened in February this year.
The only gripe i have is the huge & heavy sliding door to the bathroom, it's too heavy to push it open/shut when you need to access the bathroom.

There's a short strip of shops & eateries just behind the hotel establishment. The beautiful Nusa Dua beach is just 5 to 10min.s walking distance, simply ask the hotel security guards or staff for the direction. Staff were very friendly & courteous. Nusa Dua beach is so much cleaner & pretty than Kuta beach.

There's practically no where else to go to around the Nusa Dua area after dark. But that is okay since we were really dead beat after the day-trips to GWK, Uluwatu temple, the sandy beaches, etc.
Before i went to bed, I heard the low bass sound of airplanes flying over in the slience of the night. It wasn't disturbing or loud at all, my room-mates didnt even notice that & slept soundly.

Totally enjoyed the stay at Courtyard by Marriot and i would love to return in future. A great retreat location to enjoy the peace & quiet away from all the hustle & bustle of Kuta.
reviews.positives: FREE Marriot Rewards member for life upon check-in, FREE WIFI access 24/7, Free use of gym & fitness room, iphone docking amplifier-cum charger in bedroom, Plasma TV with clear cable programs, Electric kettle, Electronic weighing machine in bathroom, lovely landscapes, impressive swimming pool with ample day beds, 5 - 10 min.s walk to Nusa Dua beach

reviews.title: New and clean hotel

reviews.title: Good value for money
reviews.text:
The room size is reasonable but incredibly relaxing and homie. Staff are helpful and you can get free super speed internet connection by registering as marriott member.

However, there were some leaks at our bathroom showers and the soundproffing of the rooms can be improved. You can almost hear every people walking on the aisle and people next door.

Security of ppl travelling with/rented vehicle can also be improved as they dont provide any identification for all the vehicle parked in the area.
reviews.positives: the pool area is nice and the location are great for a laid back holiday

reviews.title: Comfort hotel with a nice swimming pool

reviews.title: Travel with friends
reviews.text:
Place is clean and with wide spaces
Was a bit remote from other activities
Has shuttle for beach club access
reviews.response:
Dear Maria, 

Thank you for your feedback! We're delighted to hear that you found our resort clean with ample spaces. We apologize if the location felt a bit remote from other activities, but we're glad the shuttle service to the beach club was convenient for you. We hope you had a relaxing stay overall and look forward to welcoming you back soon!

Warm regards, 
Courtyard by Marriott Bali Nusa Dua Resort.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Pool View, Guest Room, 2 Double, Pool View, Balcony

reviews.title: Great stay for the Christmas Holidays
reviews.text:
Had a wonderful stay at Courtyard. 
We enjoyed the pool and it is just 10 min walk to the Bali Collection. The breakfast buffet is mainly local dishes but they had eggs and sausages and pastries. The whole place is open air, only the hotel rooms have aircontioning. 
Facilities are clean except the shower rooms in the gym. 
Overall, I recommend this hotel for the holiday seasons, maybe not for the summer..
reviews.response:
Dear Jennifer,

Thank you for sharing your positive experience during your stay at Courtyard. We're pleased to hear that you enjoyed the pool and the convenient location, being only a 10-minute walk to Bali Collection. Your feedback on the breakfast buffet, facilities, and the overall atmosphere is valuable.

We appreciate your recommendation and hope to welcome you back during the holiday seasons for another enjoyable stay.

Warm regards,
Courtyard by Marriott Bali Nusa Dua Resort

reviews.title: Tired hotel in desperate need of a facelift.
reviews.text:
We have stayed here before and each year, the building looks worse and worse. Outside, the entrance is quite nice but as you wander the hallway to your room (easy to get lost) it's plain to see all the damage from water leaks in the ceilings and walls that are covered by new paint and patching. 
The front desk staff was helpful and accommodated all our requests. The bellman was friendly and we had a nice chat. The room was average and, unfortunately, we were given a connecting room as we were last year. Our last visit resulted in a change of rooms at nearly 11 PM due to extremely loud neighbors and a connecting door that offered very little privacy and did nothing to muffle the noise. This time, we were much more lucky to have no neighbors but the potential was there for another noisy stay. 
The beds are comfortable but the furniture is showing its age. The shower looked old with water stains and a rain shower that seemed as if it would fall off at any moment. The hand shower was so worn that it only pointed straight down while in it's cradle. The first shower we took led to a huge water leak on the floor as there was no sealant on the little step in the shower. To his credit, the maintenance staff came and fixed it after we made a few calls to the front desk but the condition should never get the point it was. The towels are worn to the point that they're almost no longer usable. Not what you would expect from a Marriott, even a Coutryard. 
Breakfast was very good and the staff was great. Good variety of choices that changed daily and plenty of items made to order. Sitting by the pool was pleasant but it got quite warm if breakfast was taken after 9. 
One other thing to note is the parking situation. The front desk and security check point with mandatory metal detector is a floor above ground level. After parking the rental cal with arm-loads of shopping, we were forced to walk up the driveway hill and drag our items to our room the long way. Perhaps there is valet

The hotel provides with shuttle bus to the breach and also to shopping mall. Some of the room facilities were not upkept but overall was OK.

reviews.title: Nice hotel in Nusa Dua
reviews.text: The hotel is in Nusa Dua, away from the busy district in Kuta Beach.  We were told our room was upgraded to Deluxe Kings Room.  The room was nice and the bed was comfortable.  We only stayed for 1 night and the weather was cloudy.  Should we stay longer and the weather was better, we could have enjoyed more of the hotel facilities (like the swimming pool).  The hotel is not next to the beach but the hotel provides free shuttle (about 5 mintues) to the beach.  We went to the beach twice.  The first time was at about 4 pm when it was low tide and it was bad; you would not like to swim.  The second time was at about 9 am; the beach looked better but it was quite wavy too.
reviews.positives: Nice room, good buffet breakfast and friendly staff

The culture, the temples and the great waves for surfing.  The courtyard is really a very romantic place for couples and families.  We enjoy the nightlife at the Bali Collection. such a quite place, and not so crowded.  Someday i will come back again to this place.

Lobby is huge and overall the hotel had a peaceful atmosphere, which is great for a relaxing stay.

reviews.title: Relax, comfortable hotel
reviews.text: Our pool terrace room was great and we had a great time there. Nice swimming pool and delicious poolside snacks. Buffet breakfast was good. Staff friendly. Drawback: Need to take shuttle bus (10 mins) to hotel's private beach.
reviews.positives: Very friendly staff, nice pool, good buffet breakfast

reviews.title: Great facility High level security Friendly staffs
reviews.text: Relax time in this well designed resort and enjoyed the traditional Bali Spa. Staffs are smiling, friendly and ready for "at your service" all the time.

reviews.title: Fantastic and memorable
reviews.text: My stay at courtyard by Marriott Bali nusa dua was great and memorable.

reviews.title: Good enough
reviews.text:
Pool was great. Hotel staff were friendly and breakfast was above average. The private beach was near the hotel and the shuttle bus was accessible and fast. Only 40 mins from the airport. The room was clean, but not fantastic

Cons
-The private beach (which is supposed to be the best in Bali) was very dirty. Food wrappers and other garbage was abundant. 
-The gym was a joke. With limited weights and no other machines
-Hotel was being painted and renovated so it was distracting and a little noisy 
-Room service extremely slow

reviews.title: Good location for a quite getaway
reviews.text: Good mix of hotel guest from many countries. Though not beach front... regular shuttle to the beach is provided for free.. If urgent hotel kind enough to arranged a non schedule trip

reviews.title: Very Nice Hotel
reviews.text:
relaxing stay. nice and clean room. 
i had little problem with internet connection during my stay and i'd suggest to call the internet help center directly rather than calling the receptionist or operator. 
very friendly staff.

reviews.title: Lovely hotel and service with smile
reviews.text: Nice hotel with good breakfast, also nice pool. My kids loved the kids club

reviews.title: Great service, great pool and great location
reviews.text:
This is a pretty good budget hotel in Nusa Dua area. The room while small has all the essentials you need. The pool is huge and the trees and vegetations around the pool is excellent providing a nice atmosphere around the pool area. The kids club has excellent facilities. The food price is reasonable and of a good quality.

The receptionist are and restaurant staff are warm and excellent in service.

reviews.title: Friendly hotel with Spacious room
reviews.text: The free internet was really beneficial for business travellers and the room as well as the bathroom were spacious. Need more sound proofing as footsteps along the tiled corridors can be rather noisy

reviews.title: nice hotel but not beach side
reviews.text: I liked our stay as a couple. Only thing is hotel is away from the beach and you can go 20 mins walking or by car 3 mins. OTher than that everything was OK.

reviews.title: huge hotel and elegant hotel but less warm feeling
reviews.text:
stay at courtyard nusa 2 for only 1 night for a business trip. big scale space for almost all area but for a esort its a little bit "too cold". at night bit too dark so we little bit dis oriented. 

overall its a quite nice hotel..

reviews.title: nice hotel...good reception
reviews.text:
my stay actually is great..
but they dont have beach behind the hotel..
so we must go by shuttle transport to go to the beach...
great breakfast

reviews.title: great decor. minimalist hotel
reviews.text: When I arrived at this hotel i find it simply stunning. The hotel staff are friendly and will go out of there way to do something for you.The rooms are modern and the beds are perfect for a good night sleep.The pool is lovley with a bar in the middle which they host happy hour drinks there from 4 pm everyday. The down points are that it can be noisy with guests walking past your room late at night. u have to spray the room for mosquitoes if you open the balcony. the beach is also quite far from the hotel.

reviews.title: New Hotel
reviews.text: We really enjoyed our stay and thought that the Marriot was a worthwhile place to stay. One negative was that we found our neighbouring rooms to be very loud and noisy and kept us up at night. The facility appeared new and clean, breakfasts were very nice. All in all we would recommend the Marriot.

reviews.title: Minimalis, simple n convenience
reviews.text: Ths isthe first time i stayed in courtyard. The hotel is very slim, minimales design. The serenity is there, ver simple n convenience. My children loved the pool. The hotel is more suitable for couple and for honeymooner.

reviews.title: great hotel and facilities, attentive service
reviews.text: a group of us stayed for a few days after and we loved it. rooms were clean, service was attentive and we loved the facilities.

reviews.title: Nice hotel
reviews.text: we had a nice stay in courtyard marriott. breakfast was great. the swimming pool is also quite big. our little girl had fun there. the only drawback was the mosquitos in our room. though, we've always had our room and patio doors remained closed, they're still able to find a way in our room.

reviews.title: lovely modern and nice hotel to stay
reviews.text: the room is clean and very good service also the breakfast is very nice at the pool side.. they have a big pool and also nice bar at the middle
reviews.positives: very good service and nice breakfast

reviews.title: Great environment n service, pleasant pool view
reviews.text: we spent 3 nights at marriott and the overall experience was very good. the staff were very friendly and helpful, eg my 2yo boy threw up at 3am and the housekeeping came immediately upon our call to cleanup, front office followed up next day to make sure all is fine. the restaurant menu has a good variety and taste was ok, tho breakfast was quite nice with a good mix of local fruits and offerings. for families, the kids room is quite flexible and first 3 hrs re free for those 3yo or above. the poolside room was big and comfy for our family of 3. hence overall a pleasant stay and refreshing trip.
reviews.positives: Located in quiet area, flexible kids room service

reviews.title: beautiful hotel in perfect location.
reviews.text:
we enjoyed our stay very much. the staff werd verg caring, kind and considerate.
our hotel room was very clean and tidy. we were happy with the cleanliness.
what we enjoyed the most was the evening lounge, as we could get snacks and drinks whilst listening to the piano. A very calm and relaxed atmosphere.

The gym was very clean and tidy, there was always someone there to help.

overall we had a fantastic stay in the marritt again. and would come again and recommend to friends and family.

reviews.title: good location
reviews.text: the hotel does not have own beach, but it is a cosy hotel, more to business hotel rather than resort eventhough it is located at nusa dua complex and avery safe location , far from nearby private small homes.

reviews.title: Overall a good hotel
reviews.text: I chose this hotel because it was nearer to my meeting venue (@ Grand Hyatt) and that it was new. It was probably less than 10 mins to walk, but took a cab due to the hot weather and it wasnt expensive (@ rupiah per trip for within Nusa Dua area). The only thing that may be true from past comments; was that their walls were probably thin, as I could practically hear people snoring and other noises made next door or outside and some minor problem with the shower as the water temperature wasnt consistent. But on the overall, I find the hotel good and the staffs were friendly. My colleague who stayed at the same hotel was happy with this hotel as well.
reviews.positives: It was good that the hotel was located within walking distances to some restaurants, souvenir shops and convenience stores.

reviews.title: Great hotel in Nusa Dua
reviews.text:
we were there as a group of 11 and we all had great fun. i really liked the pool. very picturesque and nice lounging atmosphere and even better live band in the evenings! 

the rooms we stayed in overlooked the pool and tanning by the balcony was also lovely. rooms were very comfortable.

spa service was great. we had the bamboo massage which totally rubbed us into serenity. body scrub which left our skins so smooth. best of all, prices were very reasonable.

no private beach at the hotel, unfortunately. that would have made it a perfect place to stay.
reviews.positives: Lovely pool. Nice ambience - spacious and zen. Good breakfast.

reviews.title: Great hotel with nice landscape
reviews.text: it is a new hotel with a very special and nice landscape when you walk along the way go to nearby shops. it has a good security which they will do screening every time enter into hotel. however, house keeping have to be improved so that the customers could get the room service for cleaning the room before 1pm.

reviews.title: Beautiful and plesant
reviews.text:
a pleasant stay at marriott. it staff are friendly, attentive and are able to converse in english. the place is well designed so it is spacious, well shaded and cool most of the day despite the heat. 

the poolside is nice with both sheltered spots for those keen to avoid the sun and places to sun-tan. the rooms meet the usual standard of a comfortable room (not exceptional but meets the expectation) with items and facilities functioning.

the hotel-stay does not come with complimentary breakfast. for the price you pay, the buffet breakfast is ordinary and lack variety. internet access isn't free for non-marriott members.

reviews.title: lovely hotel and service with a smile
reviews.text: great location with good jogging track, relaxing and great view, surround with secure environment. hotel very brand new, staff very welcome, always service with abig smile. no public transportation but hotel provide free shutle bus to beach.

reviews.title: Female
reviews.text:
i had a great stay at Courtyard. the hotel is newly built and opened a month ago and the room was great. 
even the staffs were kind and very helpful. i would definately go back to the courtyard whenever i go there again.
reviews.positives: Clean and tiny new facility, kind staffs

reviews.title: lovely hotel
reviews.text: marriott is a nice hotel as usual... but the location i at nusa dua so far from ubud and other places so take time to travel. hotel rooms are big, clean and nice.

reviews.title: awesome hotel with lovely location
reviews.text: it was a perfect stay with lovely staff which was very helpfull and courteous , they upgraded our room  and the only thing i found missing in the room is no bath tub other then that everything was perfect also wished that they had breakfast included in the room price.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: We had a wonderful stay at The Courtyard. The staff, especially Percy,  Deka, and Khadak, were very helpful and made our stay super comfortable and memorable. Thank you for sending a cake to the room to celebrate my parents’ wedding anniversary!

reviews.title: Good option in Nusa Dua
reviews.text: Good 5 star hotel option in the area. Good massages and shuttle service to the beach convenient. Good spacious rooms with balcony view overlooking the pool. Very chill place to land and arrive in Bali. Nusa Dua beach needs more beach cleanup programs. Lots of plastic in the water🥲

reviews.title: Relaxing Stay
reviews.text: The rooms are a liutle bit dated but still okay.
reviews.response:
Dear Nurain,

Thank you for choosing to stay with us and for taking the time to share your feedback. We're delighted to hear that you enjoyed a relaxing stay at our resort. Your comments regarding the room's dated appearance are duly noted, and we appreciate your understanding. Rest assured, we continuously strive to enhance our facilities and guest experiences. Your valuable feedback helps us in this endeavor. We hope to welcome you back soon for another relaxing getaway. 

Warm regards,
Courtyard by Marriott Bali Nusa Dua Resort.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Pool Terrace, Guest room, 2 Double, Pool view, Poolside, Terrace

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: clean and have access to beach. but poor service as the room was still not ready yet at 3pm
reviews.response:
Dear Deasy,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback with us. We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience you experienced with the delayed readiness of your room at 3 pm. We understand the importance of a prompt check-in, and we regret that we fell short of meeting your expectations in this regard.

Despite this issue, we're glad to hear that you found the property clean and appreciated its beach access. We appreciate your patience and hope to have the opportunity to better serve you in the future. 

Warm regards,
Courtyard by Marriott Bali Nusa Dua Resort

For the cleanliness needs improvement on lobbies, and room floors. Furniture, bed and bathroom is clean enough

reviews.title: Faulty towers
reviews.text: Unfortunately Covid has resulted in a large turn over  of staff so many are still learning their trade.  The kitchen needs to understand the order in which meals come out. All starts together, once finished then mains etc, not everything at once. Wait staff are trying to carry to much and there was always the noise of breaking chine where they had drop whole trays of meals or china.

reviews.title: ❤️ courtyard by Marriot
reviews.text:
We really enjoyed our stay in Courtyard by Marriot. The ambience was quiet and peacefull. Staffs were very warm, helpful and friendly. The new pools were great for kids. Shuttle bus service was very helpful for us. 

Club beach was great. Beautiful white sand and clean beach is a plus for our kids.

A little suggestion: Room amenity can be improved. We couldn’t find cotton and cotton bud so we have to buy it ourselves and a little love is needed for the balcony so it won’t be so dusty. But over all we are very satisfied with their service. And yes we would come back again. Thank you for having us Courtyard by Marriot.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Garden View, Guest room, 1 King, Garden view, Balcony

reviews.title: What's not to like?
reviews.text: After living in Indonesia for 25 years, I have a few simple rules - one is "don't eat the lamb". About once a year I break my rule, and I did so at the Marriott  - same result, tough, more like mutton than lamb. Which is a pity because everything else about our stay was thoroughly enjoyable. Our children adored the squirrels who came down to be fed at breakfast time, and the staff were almost over-solicitous. The beach, while a short drive away, is pristine and quiet with excellent F&B.

reviews.title: Clean room, big bed & great breakfast
reviews.text: Overall great hotel! The room is clean. The twin bed room's bed is big, able to sleep an adult with young child comfortably.   The breakfast selections is wide & good, love their freshly squeeze juices.  Big swimming pool with great pool side / MoMo Café foods serve right by the poolside.  We spend the whole afternoon with 3 young kids & grand parents, we all enjoy our stayed!
